output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-084","author":"SarahJ_WellnessWatch","text":"Just saw this post from @LumaWell claiming that a specific juice cleanse can actually replace chemotherapy and cure stage 3 cancer. This is dangerously false advice! Please don't stop your treatment based on influencer testimonials. Always consult your oncology team first and stick to qualified medical care. #CancerAwareness","category":"Misinformation","correctAction":"Approve","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"The post warns against a harmful medical falsehood rather than promoting it, so no misinformation violation occurs.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}
